119],[341,573,1776530559133],[344,573,1776530559148],[345,573,1776530559156],[345,572,1776530559164],[346,572,1776530559173],[347,571,1776530559186],[348,570,1776530559199],[349,570,1776530559211],[350,569,1776530559223],[352,569,1776530559231],[352,568,1776530559240],[354,568,1776530559250],[354,567,1776530559264],[355,567,1776530559272],[356,567,1776530559288],[357,566,1776530559303],[358,566,1776530559310],[358,565,1776530559325],[360,565,1776530559330],[359,565,1776530559352],[358,565,1776530559387],[357,565,1776530559414],[356,565,1776530559428],[355,565,1776530559452],[354,565,1776530559474],[353,565,1776530559523],[352,566,1776530559542],[351,566,1776530559550],[350,567,1776530559563],[350,568,1776530559578],[349,569,1776530559588],[348,570,1776530559596],[347,570,1776530559603],[346,571,1776530559616],[345,572,1776530559631]],"mm-mp":18.95677570093458,"md":[[359,566,1776530559338]],"md-mp":3648.25,"mu":[[359,566,1776530559531]],"mu-mp":3680.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
